title: Bitcoin Stamps Development
description: Rules for development workflow, testing, and best practices for the Bitcoin Stamps project.

instructions: This is the authoritative source for development workflow and standards.
Includes setup instructions, workflow, and best practices.
Reference this document when onboarding new developers.
Follow test patterns for new features.
Run with: cd indexer && poetry run pytest tests/
Add thorough tests for any new functionality.
Useful for investigating specific transactions or blocks.
Reference CLAUDE.md for common debug commands.

patterns.description: Guide for Claude and other AI assistants
instructions: Contains common commands, code style guidelines, and development notes.
Reference for AI tools working with the codebase.
Points to detailed documentation for various components.

conceptDefinitions.definition: Dependency management tool used for Python dependencies in the indexer.
Approach to validating code changes through unit, integration, and functional tests.
Formatting and style guidelines including black for formatting, flake8 for linting, and mypy for type checking.
Process for making and testing changes, including setting up the development environment, running tests, and submitting pull requests.
Utilities for debugging and troubleshooting issues in the codebase.

relatedDocumentation.description: System architecture to understand component relationships
Database schema and operations for development work
Documentation for working with the Rust parser

developmentCommands.command: cd indexer && poetry run task build
cd indexer && poetry run pytest tests/
